architecture_descriptions.fullstack: End-to-end system design covering both high-performance backends and modern frontend architectures for enterprise solutions.
architecture_descriptions.react: Comprehensive frontend architecture focusing on component modularity, state management efficiency, and atomic design principles.
architecture_descriptions.dotnet: Robust backend architecture utilizing Modular Monoliths, Clean Architecture, and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to ensure scalability.
architecture_descriptions.sql: High-integrity database modeling focusing on relational efficiency, normalization, and optimized query performance for complex data.

identity.title: Identity & Security
identity.description: User authentication, role-based access control, and tenant security.

billing.title: Billing & Finance
billing.description: Automated invoicing, tax processing, and financial reporting.

tenancy.title: Tenancy Management
tenancy.description: Multi-tenant isolation and subscription-based access control.

invoices.title: Invoices & Documents
invoices.description: Generate and manage digital invoices with automated processing.

hero.name: Ayman Ahmed
p: React.js, ASP.NET Core, and SQL Server

about.content: I am a Full Stack Developer dedicated to engineering high-performance web applications and robust backend systems. I specialize in building efficient, scalable enterprise solutions with a deep focus on Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD). My goal is to transform complex business requirements into seamless digital experiences.

architecture.content: I specialize in building complex Enterprise systems using Modular Monolith architectures. By decoupling systems into independent modules like Identity, Billing, and Invoices, I ensure that the software is scalable, maintainable, and strictly follows Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles.

works.content: The following projects demonstrate my ability to handle complex logic and architectural designs. From desktop license management to simulation systems, each project reflects my commitment to data integrity, performance, and user experience.

message.placeholder: What do you want to say?

add_card.title: Share Your Experience
add_card.p: Worked with me? I'd love to hear your feedback!

modal.p: Your feedback will be sent via WhatsApp for review before being added to the site.

freelance.title: Full Stack Developer
points: Designed and implemented high-performance enterprise applications using .NET and React.js.
Developed complex systems like DVLD using 3-Layer Architecture for maximum scalability.
Ensured high data integrity and secure transaction logic in banking and financial modules.
Built modular, responsive user interfaces following Atomic Design principles.

diploma.title: Diploma in Computer Science
points: Specialized in software engineering principles, OOP, and relational database management.
Engineered multiple academic projects focusing on SQL Server performance.
Graduated with a strong foundation in architectural patterns and desktop-to-web migration.

saad.text: Ayman did a great job on our management system. His attention to detail and architectural knowledge is impressive.
saad.name: Saad Al-Amri

communication-hub.name: Enterprise Communication Hub
communication-hub.description: A highly extensible Real-time Communication Hub for enterprise systems. I engineered the core messaging engine using SignalR and designed a modular framework for Support and Incident Reporting.

gcorp-ecommerce.name: G-Corp | E-commerce Portfolio
gcorp-ecommerce.description: A curated portfolio of 8 professional e-commerce stores built for clients across Saudi Arabia — covering fashion, perfumes, and fabrics. Full-service delivery from design to deployment.

invoice-flow.name: InvoiceFlowPro
invoice-flow.description: A professional Modular Monolith system designed for invoice management, featuring advanced modules for Identity, Tenancy, and Billing built with DDD principles.

dvld.name: DVLD System
dvld.description: A comprehensive 3-layer management system for vehicle license services, handling issuance and renewal with role-based access control (RBAC).

banking.name: Banking Simulation
banking.description: A secure banking system simulation replicating core operations and fund transfers using OOP principles and layered architecture.

apartment-rental.name: Apartment Rental
apartment-rental.description: An automated management system for apartments managing contracts and payments with automated business rules.

3d-portfolio.name: 3D Personal Portfolio
3d-portfolio.description: An interactive 3D web application designed to showcase expertise, featuring high-performance models and Framer Motion animations.
